states.name: active
states.description: Workspace may accept ordinary authorized work whether or not any runtime materialization exists.
entry_requirements: Workspace identity, current revision, owner and policies exist.

states.name: suspended
states.description: Ordinary new mutation/materialization is blocked while identity and history remain retained.
entry_requirements: Suspension authority, reason and handling of active work are recorded.

states.name: archived
states.description: Workspace is retained for reference/export/recovery and normally has no running materialization.
entry_requirements: Archive scope, retention and active-work disposition are recorded.

states.name: retired
states.description: Workspace identity/history remains but ordinary reactivation is not permitted without successor/import authority.
entry_requirements: No active ordinary authority remains and successor/retention policy is recorded.

required_preconditions: Canonical Workspace identity, owner and initial Workspace Revision are durable.
New work is blocked and active Activities/Sessions/materializations have an explicit policy.
Membership/policy/current revision remain valid; runtime recovery is not implied.
Runtime materializations and active work are stopped, transferred or explicitly excepted; retention/export scope is recorded.
No active ordinary authority remains and successor/retention/deletion policy is recorded.
